detectors.description:
Reentrancy in QatarInu.openTrading() (QatarInu.sol#589-615):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (QatarInu.sol#599)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (QatarInu.sol#601)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (QatarInu.sol#601)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (QatarInu.sol#611)
	QatarInu.tradingOpen (QatarInu.sol#297) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- QatarInu.openTrading() (QatarInu.sol#589-615)

	- [QatarInu.openTrading()](QatarInu.sol#L589-L615)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in QatarInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (QatarInu.sol#455-519):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (QatarInu.sol#501)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (QatarInu.sol#533-545)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (QatarInu.sol#507)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (QatarInu.sol#583)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (QatarInu.sol#517)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (QatarInu.sol#671)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (QatarInu.sol#651)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (QatarInu.sol#653)
	QatarInu._rOwned (QatarInu.sol#255) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- QatarInu._takeTeam(uint256) (QatarInu.sol#665-673)
	- QatarInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (QatarInu.sol#647-661)
	- QatarInu.balanceOf(address) (QatarInu.sol#373-377)
	- QatarInu.constructor() (QatarInu.sol#323-337)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (QatarInu.sol#517)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (QatarInu.sol#679)
	QatarInu._rTotal (QatarInu.sol#271) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- QatarInu._getCurrentSupply() (QatarInu.sol#771-781)
	- QatarInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (QatarInu.sol#677-683)
	- QatarInu.constructor() (QatarInu.sol#323-337)
	- QatarInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (QatarInu.sol#429-437)

	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
